message.content:
@startuml
actor TaskControl
participant Reins_Agent
participant ExecCommands
participant HostRegistry

loop [all_clients]
  TaskControl -> Reins_Agent : [01] identified_key
end

box "connection check"
end box

group connection check
  Reins_Agent -> ExecCommands : [02] check(identified_key)
  activate ExecCommands
  ExecCommands -> ExecCommands : [03] varid?(identified_key)
  ExecCommands ->x Reins_Agent : [04] status
  deactivate ExecCommands
  Reins_Agent --> TaskControl : [05] status
end

group logging status
  TaskControl -> HostRegistry : [06] rewrite_status(identified_key, status)
  activate HostRegistry
  HostRegistry -> HostRegistry : [07] set_status(identified_key, IPaddress, status)
  HostRegistry -> HostRegistry : [08] store()
  HostRegistry --> TaskControl : [09] true or false
  deactivate HostRegistry
end

@enduml
